curation_notes: Re-curated. Patch modifies a single file (internal/server/instance/drivers/driver_lxc.go), specifically the setupCredentials function. The fix replaces direct filepath.Join + os.WriteFile/os.Chown calls with os.OpenRoot (openat2) confined operations. No sibling files contain credential handling (driver_qemu.go does not implement setupCredentials). L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2: area now names the systemd credential subsystem, description adds context about the shared directory mechanism and the credential naming syntax permitting periods. Vulnerability class path-traversal confirmed from CWE-22, advisory description, and patch diff.
